2023-2024 KHAS Theater Department Additional Quota Exam List of Those Eligible to Register

Master List

The main list is stated in candidate number order.

Reserve List

They are listed in order of success, and if there is a quota left after the main list registrations are completed, they can register in order of success.

2682

2679

2674

Main list registration dates: 19-20 September

Waitlist registration dates: September 21

Important Note:

Registered candidates should check the English proficiency exam dates on the academic calendar and take the exam.
